title: Wrist Function
parameters:
point	Optional.
		  P number
		 or P(expr)
		 or point label or point expression.  If point is omitted,
		 then the wrist orientation of the current robot position is returned.
see_also:
Elbow, Hand, J4Flag, J6Flag, Wrist Statement

Wrist Function Example

Print Wrist(pick)

Print Wrist(P1)

Print Wrist

Print Wrist(P1 + P2)
examples:
Print Wrist(pick)
Print Wrist(P1)
Print Wrist
Print Wrist(P1 + P2)
